user_query: I'm planning a fun-filled evening with my family and I want to surprise them with a movie marathon. Can you fetch the names and links of the latest movies available? Also, provide me with the last 10 spins history and details of Lightning Roulette to add some thrill to our movie night.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest movies available along with their names and links.
Get the last 10 spins history and details of Lightning Roulette.
